prompts.prompt: Build a toolbar with icon buttons for Bold, Italic, Underline, and Link. Each button should show a tooltip with the action name and keyboard shortcut on hover.
Build a feedback form that opens in a dialog. It should have a title field, a long-form text area for comments, and a submit button. Show a success state after submission.
Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
Show a dashboard widget with loading → error → data states
Build an email inbox view with a table showing sender, subject, date, and a preview snippet. Add row selection with checkboxes and a bulk actions bar that appears when items are selected.
Cards that stack vertically on mobile but show in a grid on desktop
Build a quantity selector for a shopping cart item. It should have a number input with increment/decrement, min of 1, max of 99. Changing the quantity should call an update API endpoint.
Create a new page for a settings dashboard. It should have a header with the app title, a sidebar for navigation, and a main content area. Use the XDS theme system.
Display a code example with a label that says 'Installation' above it, the code snippet 'yarn add @astryxdesign/core', and a note below in small text
I have a section of my app that needs a different theme than the rest — like a dark sidebar next to a light content area. How do I nest themes in XDS?
